en_title: Assassin's Creed Shadows Final Update Arrives Next Week, Just Over a Year After Launch
cn_title: 《刺客信条：影》最终更新下周上线，发售仅一年多
subtitle: 武士大戏落幕
opus_summary: 育碧宣布《刺客信条：影》将于6月16日发布最终更新1.1.11，标志着这款武士题材大作在发售仅15个月后停止重大内容更新。玩家抱怨其后续支持远不如前作《刺客信条：英灵殿》，仅有一个DLC《淡路之爪》。

paragraphs.en: Ubisoft has confirmed it will release a final Assassin's Creed Shadows update next week on June 16, bringing to a close its additional content for the game.
paragraphs.cn: 育碧已确认将于6月16日发布《刺客信条：影》的最终更新，为该作的追加内容画上句号。

paragraphs.en: While it's possible that future tweaks and bug fixes may follow, Ubisoft has labelled Title Update 1.1.11 as "one last update" for its samurai blockbuster, just 15 months after launch, signalling that this is the end for notable additions.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管未来仍有可能推出微调和修复补丁，但育碧已将1.1.11版本更新称为这款武士题材大作的「最后一次更新」，此时距发售仅15个月，标志着重大内容更新的终结。

paragraphs.en: Fans have lamented how Shadows has received noticeably fewer post-launch updates than its enormously-successful predecessor, Assassin's Creed Valhalla. Just one expansion, Claws of Awaji, arrived during Shadows' first year — before Ubisoft confirmed it was winding down support .
paragraphs.cn: 玩家们感叹，《影》获得的发售后更新数量远少于其大获成功的前作《刺客信条：英灵殿》。在《影》发售的第一年里，仅有一个扩展包《淡路之爪》推出——随后育碧便确认将逐步停止支持。

paragraphs.en: Comparisons between Valhalla and Shadows are difficult, as the former launched in the middle of Covid lockdowns in 2020 when many more people were at home playing video games, and keen for more to play. Shadows, meanwhile, is being immediately followed by the highly-anticipated Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced, which Ubisoft is likely keen not to distract attention from.
paragraphs.cn: 将《英灵殿》与《影》直接比较并不公平，因为前者于2020年新冠疫情封锁期间发售，当时更多人居家玩游戏，且渴望更多可玩内容。而《影》之后紧接着就是备受期待的《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》，育碧很可能不希望分散玩家对后者的注意力。

paragraphs.en: But with word of a scrapped co-op expansion that would have continued the story of Shadows and its fledgling brotherhood, fans have lamented not seeing more from its characters. At the same time, with no further word on its sale figures in almost a year, there's a feeling that Shadows has just not done the business it needs to remain an ongoing concern — particularly with Black Flag on the horizon, and the witchcraft-themed Assassin's Creed Hexe after that.
paragraphs.cn: 但有传闻称，一款本应延续《影》及其初生兄弟会故事的多人合作扩展已被取消，玩家们遗憾未能看到更多角色故事。与此同时，近一年来育碧未再公布《影》的销售数据，让人感觉这款游戏并未达到维持长期运营所需的商业表现——尤其考虑到《黑旗 记忆重置》即将到来，之后还有以巫术为主题的《刺客信条：女巫》。

paragraphs.en: "Still can’t believe this is how the game ended up. After all this time of waiting for a Japan setting and it just came and went," wrote galaxyadmirer on reddit , in a lengthy thread discussing Shadows' upcoming final update. "Letdown is an understatement," agreed ShawshankException. "The story ended the second it got interesting and then was entirely ignored in the DLC."
paragraphs.cn: 「仍然不敢相信这游戏就这么结束了。等了这么久才盼来日本背景，结果它来了又走了，」Reddit用户galaxyadmirer在讨论《影》即将到来的最终更新的长帖中写道。「说失望都轻了，」ShawshankException附和道。「故事刚变得有趣就戛然而止，然后在DLC里完全被无视了。」

paragraphs.en: In a tease to fans , Shadows assistant game director Simon Lemay-Comtois stated that a "black tide was coming to Japan" — suggesting this update will be used to somehow tease Black Flag Resynced. Here's hoping Naoe and Yasuke also get a chance for one last adventure.
paragraphs.cn: 在给玩家的预告中，《影》的助理游戏总监Simon Lemay-Comtois表示「一股黑色浪潮即将席卷日本」——暗示此次更新将以某种方式为《黑旗 记忆重置》造势。希望奈绪江和弥助也能有机会进行最后一次冒险。

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN新闻编辑。可通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系他，或在Bluesky上找到他。

translated_terms.Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced: 《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》
